graphEvents.label: Markdown indexed in same corpus as source
pure vector scoring allows markdown to outrank implementation
markdown corpus participation creates source/document competition
no source-role metadata blocks implementation-intent reranking

question: Q3
summary: REQ-019 is a source-class ranking bug: implementation files can appear after research markdown or not at all for technical implementation queries.
evidence: 005-memory-search-runtime-bugs/spec.md:222 records top 9 markdown results before mcp_server/handlers/code-graph/query.ts at result 10
006-search-intelligence-stress-test/scratch/live-probes-2026-04-26.md:40-52 records semantic-search implementation query surfacing only research markdown

question: Q3
summary: Project CocoIndex settings index markdown/text files in the same corpus as implementation source.

question: Q3
summary: The CocoIndex schema stores file_path/language/content/lines/embedding but no path_class, source_role, canonical path, or documentation/source distinction.
evidence: cocoindex_code/indexer.py:179-189 writes alias file_path and chunk content

question: Q3
summary: Query ranking is pure vector distance; project/server layers pass rows through without reranking or path-class adjustment.
evidence: cocoindex_code/query.py:14-16 converts L2 distance to score
cocoindex_code/query.py:27-44 and 72-80 order only by distance
cocoindex_code/query.py:115-145 maps rows directly to QueryResult
cocoindex_code/project.py:174-203 and server.py:139-155 pass results through

question: Q3
summary: Direct corpus-count telemetry from target_sqlite.db was blocked because plain sqlite3 cannot load the vec0 virtual table.

question: Q3
summary: Prefer code-first indexing for CocoIndex and route spec research to Spec Kit Memory; if mixed corpus is required, add path_class/source_role metadata and bounded implementation-intent reranking with raw and adjusted scores exposed.
evidence: Pure vector ranking has no source-role signal; markdown is included in project settings; query path has no reranker
